headline: Wall Street Sours on Lyft, Price Target Cut
summary: Lyft (NASDAQ:LYFT) stock is already trading well below where it started the year, and Truist just made the bear case more official. Analyst Youssef Squali cut his price target on Lyft to $15 from $18 while maintaining a Hold rating, citing winter storm disruptions, the integration impact of the Freenow acquisition, and rising fuel costs ... Wall Street Sours on Lyft, Price Target Cut

headline: How The iRhythm Holdings (IRTC) Narrative Is Shifting With New Guidance And DOJ Overhang
summary: The updated fair value estimate for iRhythm Holdings is now US$211.43 per share, compared with the prior US$211, reflecting only a very small change in the modelled price target. That modest adjustment sits against a backdrop of research desks tightening their fair value bands and, in some cases, trimming targets into the US$184 to US$215 range as they weigh Q4 execution, reiterated long term guidance, sector multiple moves, and the DOJ overhang. Read on to see how these shifting targets feed...
